# CD5600

> CD5600 is a premier high-fidelity physical music shop based in Tbilisi, Georgia. We offer highly curated, original European and American imported CDs.

## About Us
In an era of compressed digital streaming, CD5600 preserves the archival grade of original albums. We specialize in 1.41 Mbps bit-perfect, lossless audio (Linear PCM encoding). Music isn't just audio; it's art, memory, and identity. 

## Key Information
* **Authenticity:** 100% authentic, original pressings imported from verified distributors in the US and Europe. Zero bootlegs. Zero counterfeit media.
* **Condition:** Brand-new imports arrive completely factory sealed.
* **Location:** Tbilisi, Georgia.
* **Shipping:** We ship anywhere in Georgia in secure, anti-static industrial packaging. 
  * Tbilisi Zone: 7.99 GEL
  * Outside Tbilisi (Batumi, Kutaisi, Rustavi, etc.): 9.99 GEL
  * Mountainous regions: 10.99 GEL
* **Returns:** Accepted only if the factory seal is intact, or if the disc arrives cracked/defective.

## Custom Requests
We accept custom requests for specific out-of-print, master recordings, or limited edition physical copies. Reach out to our curators via Instagram.

## Links
* **Official Website:** https://www.cd5600.shop
* **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/cd.5600/
* **Extra:** https://extra.ge/seller/cd-5600/419
